song.title: I Am Crucified With Christ
song.author: Galations 2:20
song.lyrics:
[C] .C F I am crucified with Christ, . C F C And it is no longer I who liveth, . F G But it is Christ who lives in me. . C F And the life, which I now live, . C F In the flesh, I live in faith, . C G The faith in the Son of God, . F G C Who loved and gave Himself up for me.
[V1] . F And now I’m walking by the Spirit, . C F Step by step, day by day. . C F G Oh Lord I love You, You’re the precious One to me. . C F As I do this and that, . C F Lord remind me where You’re at. . C F G C You’re in my spirit, dispensing grace to me.
[V2] And now I’m walking by the Spirit, Marching on toward the goal. O Lord Your purpose means everything to me. All self love I lay aside, For the church is for Your Bride, For the fulfillment of Your economy.
